# Generated by apps/mods/stellaris/3x-bigger-worlds/scripts/build.py
# Multiplier: x3
# Transformations:
#   district_*_max_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   district_*_min_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   planet_max_districts_add  = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   produces = { res = N }    ->  res = N * 3  (positive numeric only)
# Untouched:
#   Negative values (blocker penalties stay at vanilla magnitude).
#   `@VAR` references (handled in scripted_variables/zz_bworlds_*).
#   `upkeep = { ... }` blocks (net deposit output therefore skews
#   3x-favorable on deposits with upkeep; see README).

d_deep_sleep_cryo_pods = {
	icon = d_cryo_pods

	time = 360

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers

	potential = { always = no }

	can_be_cleared = {
		custom_tooltip = {
			fail_text = nomad_economy_progress
			owner = {
				any_situation = {
					is_situation_type = situation_nomad_economy
					current_stage = situation_nomad_economy_stage_3_thriving
				}
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_add = -200
		job_ark_deep_sleep_add = 1000
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers
		cost = {
			alloys = 1000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				owner = {
					country_uses_food = yes
				}
			}
			food = 1000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				owner = {
					country_uses_food = no
				}
			}
			alloys = 250
		}
	}

	on_cleared = {
		add_deposit = d_deep_sleep_cryo_pods_renewed
	}

	inline_script = deposits/ai_weight_pop_creating_blocker
}

d_deep_sleep_cryo_pods_renewed = {
	icon = d_cryo_pods

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	potential = { always = no }

	planet_modifier = {
		job_ark_deep_sleep_add = 100
		planet_pops_upkeep_mult = -0.05
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_modifier = planet_deep_sleep
		}
		job_ark_deep_sleep_add = 233
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}

	resources = {}
}

d_protostar = {
	icon = d_binary_stars
	resources = {
		category = orbital_research_deposits
		produces = {
			energy = 15
			physics_research = 30
		}
	}

	habitat_modifier = {
		district_hab_energy_max_add = 6
		district_hab_science_max_add = 9
	}

	station = shipclass_research_station
	is_for_colonizable = no

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

	is_for_colonizable = yes

	icon = d_mining_tunnels

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_max_districts_add = 3
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_trophy_hall = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	icon = d_trophy_hall

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner? = {
				is_gestalt = no
			}
		}
		job_soldier_add = 50
		planet_army_build_speed_mult = 0.1
		job_soldier_stability_add = 0.25
		mult = owner.value:nomadic_champion_trophy_collection
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			owner? = {
				is_gestalt = yes
			}
		}
		job_warrior_drone_add = 50
		planet_army_build_speed_mult = 0.1
		job_soldier_stability_add = 0.25
		mult = owner.value:nomadic_champion_trophy_collection
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_forgotten_level = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	icon = d_mining_tunnels
	category = deposit_cat_rare

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_mult = 0.1
		planet_artificial_max_districts_add = 1
	}

	potential = { always = no }
}

d_forgotten_level_blocker = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers
	time = 360
	icon = d_station_junk
	planet_modifier = {
		#adding the housing and district from above
	}
	blocker_swap_types = {
		d_forgotten_level
	}
	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers
		cost = {
			energy = 1000
		}
	}
	on_cleared = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_origin = origin_sacred_path
				}
			}
			owner = {
				add_modifier = {
					modifier = sacred_path_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult
					mult = 0.1
					days = 1080
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_origin = origin_heirs_of_the_khan
				}
			}
			owner = {
				add_modifier = {
					modifier = strike_craft_modifier
					mult = 0.2
					days = 1080
				}
			}
		}
	}
	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_cluttered_hangar_bay = {
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	icon = "d_station_junk"
	category = deposit_cat_blockers
	time = 180

	potential = { always = no }

	planet_modifier = {
		weapon_type_strike_craft_weapon_damage_mult = -0.25
	}

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers
		cost = {
			energy = 300
		}
	}

	on_cleared = {
		hidden_effect = {
			owner? = {
				add_mission_counter = {
					mission =  NOMAD_CHECKLIST_CLEAR_HANGAR_BAYS
					counter = CLEARED_HANGAR_BAYS
					amount = 1
				}
			}
		}
		owner = {
			random_list = {
				1 = {
					add_resource = {
						alloys = 300
					}
				}
				1 = {
					add_resource = {
						exotic_gases = 125
					}
				}
				1 = {
					add_resource = {
						rare_crystals = 125
					}
				}
				1 = {
					add_resource = {
						volatile_motes = 125
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 5
	}
}

d_dark_matter_monolith = {
	icon = d_monument
	category = deposit_cat_rare
	is_for_colonizable = yes

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_physicists_physics_research_produces_add = 0.25
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		job_physicist_add = 200
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		job_calculator_physicist_add = 200
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_deposits
	}

	potential = { always = no }
	drop_weight = { weight = 0 }
}
